title: Your Store Card Discount Is a $2,800 Debt Trap
hook: You saved $34 at checkout when you signed up for that store credit card — and that yes cost you $2,800.
angle: Store cards charge 28.9% APR (nearly 10 points above average), 42% of holders carry balances, and the signup hits your credit score — all while the cashier pitches it as a reward
audience: Shoppers who've been talked into store cards at checkout for a one-time discount
key_numbers: 42% of store card holders carry a balance
5-10 point hard inquiry credit score drop
$2,800 total paid on a $1,200 balance over 2 years
